---
title: "Ian Gault"
subtitle: "Professional Biologist | Analytical Chemistry & Toxicology | Data Science"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: media/109_IanG_2024.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/iangault
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/iangault
---

## About

I'm a certified Professional Biologist specializing in Analytical Chemistry & Toxicology, with six years of consulting experience and a demonstrated aptitude for Data Science. Skilled in processing and reporting on high-resolution and high-dimensional data while implementing efficient database management and workflow. Seeking to advance my career by applying data science and machine learning concepts to solve real-world problems.

## Education

**Master of Data Science** *(in progress)*
University of British Columbia

**B.Sc. [Your Degree]**
[Your Institution]

## Experience

**[Job Title]** | [Organization] | [Years]
Brief description of role and key contributions.

**[Job Title]** | [Organization] | [Years]
Brief description of role and key contributions.

## Skills

**Data & Programming:** R, Python, SQL, Quarto

**Analytical:** High-resolution mass spectrometry, toxicology, environmental chemistry

**Tools:** [Add your tools here]

## Certifications

- Registered Professional Biologist (R.P.Bio.)
- [Other certifications]
